auth.label: API Key
auth.description: CentralStationCRM API key sent with the X-apikey header. Create or view API keys under Account settings > API: https://centralstationcrm.com/api-basics.

extraFields.label: Account
extraFields.description: Your CentralStationCRM account subdomain from https://{account}.centralstationcrm.net. You can enter either the subdomain or the full account URL.

no_log.description: Whether CentralStationCRM should skip creating a protocol log.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a CentralStationCRM company.

raw.description: The raw object returned by CentralStationCRM.
The raw object returned by CentralStationCRM.

outputSchema.description: The output payload containing the created CentralStationCRM company.

anyOf.description: The monetary value of the deal.
The billing type of the deal value.
The target date for the deal.

probability.description: The probability of winning the deal in percent.

person_ids_set.description: Comma-separated person identifiers to assign to the deal.

The timestamp when the deal was finished.
The probability of winning the deal in percent.

raw.description: The raw object returned by CentralStationCRM.

outputSchema.description: The output payload containing the created CentralStationCRM deal.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Get one CentralStationCRM company by identifier.

raw.description: The raw object returned by CentralStationCRM.
The raw object returned by CentralStationCRM.

outputSchema.description: The output payload containing one CentralStationCRM company.

actions.name: get_deal
actions.description: Get one CentralStationCRM deal by identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one CentralStationCRM record.

raw.description: The raw object returned by CentralStationCRM.

anyOf.description: The monetary value of the deal.
The billing type of the deal value.
The total value sum returned by CentralStationCRM.
The value count returned by CentralStationCRM.
The target date for the deal.
The timestamp when the deal was finished.
The probability of winning the deal in percent.

raw.description: The raw object returned by CentralStationCRM.

actions.description: Get the current CentralStationCRM API user.

outputSchema.description: The output payload containing the current CentralStationCRM user.

tag_name.description: The CentralStationCRM tag name to filter by.
